subject: [PATCH v4 1/3] fuse: whitelist the request headers for usercopy

reviews.author: Bernd Schubert
reviews.summary: reviewer noted that the extra hop through a tmp stack variable is negligible due to small memcpys (~40 bytes) and memory being in L1 cache, but didn't express a strong opinion
reviews.raw_body:
Sorry for late replies, currently on vacation and reviews only when
everyone else is asleep.

I don't have a strong opinion, I wondered the same if the stack copy was
avoidable, but then came to the same conclusion as Joanne - negligible
overhead.


Thanks,
Bernd

2026-07-15.patch_summary: This patch whitelists request headers for usercopy in the fuse module, allowing them to be safely accessed by userspace without requiring additional memory copies.
